items.title: One Million Passports Leaked Online
items.summary: A database of almost a million passports from around the world was leaked online. Note what happened. A high-value credential a passport was used in an ancillary low-value authentication system: ID verification for cannabis dispensaries. And it s the low-value system that got hacked, putting the high-value credential at risk.

Their conclusion: Role tags were a formatting trick that became the security architecture and the cognitive scaffolding of modern LLMs. We ve shown …
